description: This file contains service functions for managing invitations in a user onboarding system, including creating, revoking, and accepting invitations, with associated event logging.

classes.name: AppUser
classes.description: Model representing a user in the application

classes.name: Invitation
classes.description: Model representing an invitation sent to a prospective user

classes.name: OnboardingEvent
classes.description: Model representing events related to user onboarding process

methods.name: str _hash_token(raw_token: str)
methods.description: Hashes a raw token string using SHA-256, used for securely storing tokens

methods.name: AppUser accept_invitation_and_signup_flow( *, db: AsyncSession, raw_token: str, email: str, password: str, display_name: str | None, )
tuple[Invitation,str] create_invitation_flow( *, db: AsyncSession, invited_by_user_id: uuid.UUID, email: str, expires_in_hours: int, )
Invitation revoke_invitation_flow(*, db: AsyncSession, invitation_id: uuid.UUID)

ctags.name: accept_invitation_and_signup_flow
ctags.signature: ( *, db: AsyncSession, raw_token: str, email: str, password: str, display_name: str | None, )

ctags.name: create_invitation_flow
ctags.signature: ( *, db: AsyncSession, invited_by_user_id: uuid.UUID, email: str, expires_in_hours: int, )

ctags.name: revoke_invitation_flow
ctags.pattern: /^async def revoke_invitation_flow(*, db: AsyncSession, invitation_id: uuid.UUID) -> Invitation:$/
